title: BHN iptables Counters
description: Per-rule packet/byte counters from iptables. 5-min cadence; deltas computed via LAG().

targets.rawSql: WITH bounded AS (SELECT node_name, chain, rule_idx, target, MAX(bytes) - MIN(bytes) AS byte_delta, MAX(packets) - MIN(packets) AS pkt_delta, MAX(rule_spec) AS rule_spec FROM iptables_stats WHERE measured_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' GROUP BY node_name, chain, rule_idx, target HAVING MAX(bytes) - MIN(bytes) > 0) SELECT node_name, chain, rule_idx, target, byte_delta, pkt_delta, rule_spec FROM bounded ORDER BY byte_delta DESC LIMIT 30

panels.title: Drop counter delta per node (DROP+REJECT targets, all chains)

targets.rawSql: WITH per_rule AS (SELECT node_name, chain, rule_idx, measured_at, packets, LAG(packets) OVER (PARTITION BY node_name, chain, rule_idx ORDER BY measured_at) AS prev_pkts FROM iptables_stats WHERE target IN ('DROP','REJECT','ufw-reject-input','ufw-reject-forward')) SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(measured_at, '5m') AS time, node_name AS metric, SUM(GREATEST(packets - COALESCE(prev_pkts, packets), 0)) AS drops FROM per_rule WHERE $__timeFilter(measured_at) GROUP BY 1, node_name ORDER BY 1
